# freesqlformatter.app

> Free online SQL formatter and beautifier. Format, indent, and highlight SQL queries instantly in your browser.

## What it does
SQL Formatter is a free, browser-based tool that formats and beautifies SQL queries with proper indentation, keyword casing, and syntax highlighting. All processing happens locally in your browser — no data is uploaded to any server.

## Key facts
- 100% free, no sign-up required
- Works offline (PWA)
- Privacy-first: zero tracking, no cookies, no analytics
- Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile
- Part of the Freesuite collection (freesuite.app)

## Features
- SQL formatting with customizable indentation (2 spaces, 4 spaces, tab)
- Keyword case control (UPPER, lower, as-is)
- SQL minification (compress to single line)
- Syntax highlighting with color-coded output
- Support for SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, CREATE TABLE, JOINs, subqueries, CTEs, window functions
- Copy to clipboard and download as .sql file
- Auto-format on paste with debounced input
- Keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Enter to format, Ctrl+Shift+M to minify)

## Comparisons
- vs SQLFormat.org: freesqlformatter.app is free and processes SQL entirely in-browser with no server uploads, SQLFormat.org sends queries to their server
- vs DBeaver: freesqlformatter.app requires no installation and works instantly in any browser, DBeaver requires downloading a desktop application

## Related tools
- freejsonformatter.app — JSON Formatter & Validator
- freebase64.app — Base64 Encoder/Decoder
- freeregextester.app — Regex Tester
- freecaseconverter.app — Case Converter

- [freesqlformatter.app vs DBeaver SQL Formatter](https://freesqlformatter.app/pages/vs-dbeaver): Comparison with DBeaver's built-in SQL formatter

- [How to Format SQL Queries](https://freesqlformatter.app/pages/how-to-format-sql): Step-by-step guide to formatting SQL
- [Free SQL Minifier Online](https://freesqlformatter.app/pages/sql-minifier): Compress SQL queries into a single line
